content.en:
"Spare your life, you are a primordial black beast, I am a cultivator, it is normal for me to kill you!"

Ye Tian said.

Jiuchen Ancestor hurriedly said: "Senior, I belong to the Dawn Holy Ancestor, I hope to let me go for the sake of the Dawn Saint Ancestor's face!"

The Nine Dust Origin Ancestor didn't know if the Dawn Holy Ancestor could suppress Ye Tian, but he could only try.

"Dawn Holy Ancestor, I'm not afraid of him, and I still have a grudge against him!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

At this moment, the Nine Dust Ancestor was completely desperate.

But suddenly, Ye Tian asked: "I want to ask you something, if you answer well, I may not kill you!"

"Senior, please speak. "

Jiuchen Ancestor hurriedly said.

"Do you know about the Original God Palace?" Ye Tian asked.

"Origin Divine Palace!" Jiuchen Origin Ancestor was stunned, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to ask this question.

In order to save his life, he didn't dare to hide it, and hurriedly said: "Senior, I know that the Primordial Divine Palace is the most powerful force among our Primordial Black Beasts, but the recruitment of Primordial Black Beasts is very strict, and it is said that it is to prevent exposure. I haven't been to Genshin Shrine either, so I don't know much about Genshin Shrine. "

"Do you know the location of Genshin Shrine?"

Ye Tian asked again.

Jiuchen Origin Ancestor shook his head, "Senior, how do I know the location of the Genshin Palace, if I don't join the Genshin Palace, it is impossible to know the location of the Genshin Palace." "

"Then how can I join Genshin Shrine?"

Ye Tian asked again.

The Nine Dust Origin Ancestor hesitated for a moment, but still said: "There are two ways to join the Origin Divine Palace, one is to cultivate to the realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, then the Origin Divine Palace will automatically find the door, it is said that they have the Primordial Black Beast that senses the Ancestral Ancestor level of the Fivefold Originator." There is also a primordial black beast with a special bloodline, which will also be found. The second way is to take the initiative to find the Genshin Palace, but instead of going to the headquarters of the Genshin Shrine, but using a token to contact the Genshin Palace, as long as you have the strength of the half-step fivefold original ancestor, you can participate in the assessment of the Genshin Palace, and if the assessment is successful, you will join the Genshin Palace. However, this kind of assessment is very difficult, I took it once, and I failed!"

"Do you have a token?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, but I've put the token in a safe place!" said the Nine Dust Ancestor.

Bang!

The body of the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor was crushed by Ye Tian's finger.

"Hehe, just a token, will you put it somewhere else?"

Ye Tian didn't have to think about it, he knew that this guy was fooling himself, and he felt that he would die if he handed over the token, so he wouldn't reveal it.

He was too lazy to talk nonsense and killed him directly.

Soon, Ye Tian found a scale from the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor's belongings, which should be the scales of a powerful Primordial Black Beast, and was refined into a special item, containing the breath of the Fivefold Ancestor.

"This should be a token!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And at this moment, a figure came across the primordial Black Sea and descended on this Nine Dust Domain.

Rumble!!!

The angry Dawn Ancestor has arrived!

"Endless Ancestor, what do you mean?"

The Dawn Saint Ancestor said coldly.

"I killed some primordial black beasts and occupied this river basin, and the Dawn Holy Ancestor suddenly came, what did it mean?" Ye Tian asked rhetorically.

"This river basin belongs to this Holy Ancestor!" Dawn Holy Ancestor said angrily, "These primordial black beasts are also my subordinates!"

"Dawn Holy Ancestor, are these Primordial Black Beasts your men, I have followed a Primordial Black Beast here, and that Primordial Black Beast is the Primordial Black Beast that attacked Sunset Mountain in the first place. Sunset Mountain is now the property of our Void Tooth Sacred Gate, and these black beasts are the enemies of the Void Tooth Holy Gate. Could it be that you instructed these primordial black beasts to invade Sunset Mountain in the first place?" Ye Tian sneered.

"This ......"

The Dawn Saint Ancestor didn't know what to say for a moment.

"I don't know what these primordial black beasts have done, but since they've been killed by you, the Endless Ancestor, forget it. However, this watershed is my private property, so the Endless Ancestor should leave!" said the Dawn Saint Ancestor.

"Hahahaha, it's really funny, I killed the original black beasts here, and now this river basin naturally belongs to me!" Ye Tian said.

This is a large river basin, which is very valuable in itself, and can also give birth to a lot of resources, even for the Fivefold Ancestor, it is not dispensable.

Therefore, he was not willing to give up.

"Endless Ancestor, do you really want to rob my watershed?" the Dawn Ancestor asked.

"Get out of here, or I'll kill you clone!"

Ye Tian said.

This completely angered the Dawn Holy Ancestor, and he immediately took action.

The Dawn Saint Ancestor is the existence of the peak of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, only one step away from the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, and he was once also the Holy Son who had comprehended one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths, and his combat power was very terrifying.

In his opinion, no matter how powerful Ye Tian is, he may not be able to beat him.

"Endless Black Domain!"

"Endless Primordial!"

"The body of the primordial Zhou Tian!"

"Endless Golden Light!"

Ye Tian directly burst out of his strength, and under the many formations, he suppressed the attack of the Dawn Holy Ancestor with just one blow of endless golden light.

Rumble!!!

The Dawn Saint Ancestor was directly knocked away by a blow, but fortunately he defended himself with a Primordial Treasure, otherwise he would have been injured, or even not lightly.

"Endless Speed!"

Ye Tian's speed was extremely fast, attacking the Dawn Saint Ancestor again and again, so that the Dawn Saint Ancestor didn't know how to resist.

Gradually, the body of the Dawn Saint Ancestor began to hurt.

"Run!"

The Dawn Ancestor didn't dare to stay, he didn't want this doppelganger to fall.

So, he ran away.

And Ye Tian didn't chase it, his cultivation was still too low, he had only just broken through to the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, and the Dawn Primordial Ancestor was already at the peak of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, so it was difficult for him to kill the Dawn Ancestor.

......

Nine Lights Holy Gate.

"I was defeated, the strength of the Endless Ancestor is so terrifying!!"

The Dawn Saint Ancestor was extremely shocked.

You must know that his strength has now surpassed many five-fold peak ancestors, infinitely close to the half-step sixfold original ancestor, and he has even mastered a trace of the realm of the half-step sixfold ancestor.

But even so, he was still defeated!

"Endless Primordial Ancestor, the distance has formed the Supreme Natal Primordial Control Technique, what are the three hundred and sixty kinds of extreme extreme paths, this guy has clearly comprehended all three hundred and sixty-five kinds of extreme extreme paths, otherwise it would be impossible to be so demonic!"

Dawn Saint Ancestor thought to himself.

However, he didn't divulge Ye Tian's strength, after all, he was defeated, what a shameful thing it was, what did he say?

"You must be promoted to the half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor realm as soon as possible, otherwise you will not be the opponent of the Endless Origin Ancestor!"

The Dawn Holy Ancestor said secretly.
